{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":"2026-07-09T18:11:07.915Z","tool_name":"write_file","tool_id":"write_file__tt4iiwxy","parameters":{"content":"import base64\nimport ssl\nimport urllib.request\nimport json\n\nca_data = \"\"\"\"\"\"\n\ncert_data = \"\"\"\"\"\"\n\nkey_data = \"\"\"\"\"\"\n\n# Decode to files\nwith open(\"/tmp/ca.crt\", \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(ca_data))\nwith open(\"/tmp/client.crt\", \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(cert_data))\nwith open(\"/tmp/client.key\", \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(key_data))\n\n# Set up SSL context\ncontext = ssl.create_default_context(cafile=\"/tmp/ca.crt\")\ncontext.load_cert_chain(certfile=\"/tmp/client.crt\", keyfile=\"/tmp/client.key\")\n\n# Query Pods\nurl = \"https://127.0.0.1:6443/api/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/pods\"\nreq = urllib.request.Request(url)\ntry:\n    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=context) as response:\n        data = json.loads(response.read().decode())\n        print(\"--- PODS ---\")\n        for pod in data.get(\"items\", []):\n            print(f\"Pod: {pod['metadata']['name']}\")\n            print(f\" service: {e}\")\n\n# Query Deployment\nurl_deploy = \"https://127.0.0.1:6443/apis/apps/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/deployments/web-backend\"\nreq_deploy = urllib.request.Request(url_deploy)\ntry:\n    with urllib.request.urlopen(req_deploy, context=context) as response:\n        data = json.loads(response.read().decode())\n        print(\"--- DEPLOYMENT ---\")\n        print(f\"Deployment Template Labels: {data['spec']['template']['metadata'].get('labels', {})}\")\n        print(f\"Deployment Selector: {data['spec'].get('selector', {})}\")\nexcept Exception as e:\n    print(f\"Error deployment: {e}\")\n","file_path":"/tmp/get_pods.py"}}

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":"2026-07-09T18:12:19.435Z","tool_name":"write_file","tool_id":"write_file__ezjf9331","parameters":{"file_path":"/Users/yangligt/.gemini/tmp/workspace-11/query_k8s_direct.py","content":"import base64\nimport ssl\nimport urllib.request\nimport json\nimport os\n\ndef load_kubeconfig():\n    with open(os.path.expanduser(\"~/.kube/config\"), \"r\") as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    \n    # We will do a simple scan for the kind-kubectl-axi-bench config\n    # Since we don't have PyYAML, we can parse it using simple line-based scanning\n    # for clusters/users.\n    \n    lines = content.splitlines()\n    \n    ca_data = None\n    cert_data = None\n    key_data = None\n    \n    # Extract cluster ca-data\n    in_kind_cluster = False\n    for i, line in enumerate(lines):\n        if \"name: kind-kubectl-axi-bench\" in line:\n            # Check if this is under the clusters section\n            # We can look backwards or forwards\n            # Let's find \"certificate-authority-data:\" near it\n            for j in range(max(0, i-10), min(len(lines), i+10)):\n                if \"certificate-authority-data:\" in lines[j]:\n                    ca_data = lines[j].split(\"certificate-authority-data:\")[1].strip()\n                    break\n        if ca_data:\n            break\n            \n    # Extract user cert/key\n    for i, line in enumerate(lines):\n        if \"name: kind-kubectl-axi-bench\" in line:\n            # Let's find \"client-certificate-data:\" and \"client-key-data:\" near it\n            for j in range(max(0, i-5), min(len(lines), i+15)):\n                if \"client-certificate-data:\" in lines[j]:\n                    cert_data = lines[j].split(\"client-certificate-data:\")[1].strip()\n                if \"client-key-data:\" in lines[j]:\n                    key_data = lines[j].split(\"client-key-data:\")[1].strip()\n        if cert_data and key_data:\n            break\n            \n    return ca_data, cert_data, key_data\n\nca_b64, cert_b64, key_b64 = load_kubeconfig()\n\nif not ca_b64 or not cert_b64 or not key_b64:\n    print(\"Could not find all credentials in kubeconfig!\")\n    exit(1)\n\n# Write credentials to temp files\nca_path = \"/Users/yangligt/.gemini/tmp/workspace-11/ca.crt\"\ncert_path = \"/Users/yangligt/.gemini/tmp/workspace-11/client.crt\"\nkey_path = \"/Users/yangligt/.gemini/tmp/workspace-11/client.key\"\n\nwith open(ca_path, \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(ca_b64))\nwith open(cert_path, \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(cert_b64))\nwith open(key_path, \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(key_b64))\n\n# Set up SSL Context\ncontext = ssl.create_default_context(cafile=ca_path)\ncontext.load_cert_chain(certfile=cert_path, keyfile=key_path)\n\n# Query endpoints\ndef query_api(path):\n    url = f\"https://127.0.0.1:6443{path}\"\n    req = urllib.request.Request(url)\n    try:\n        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=context) as response:\n            return json.loads(response.read().decode())\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error querying {path}: {e}\")\n        return None\n\npods = query_api(\"/api/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/pods\")\nif pods:\n    print(\"=== PODS ===\")\n    for item in pods.get(\"items\", []):\n        print(f\"Pod: {item['metadata']['name']}\")\n        print(f\"  Labels: {item['metadata'].get('labels', {})}\")\n        print(f\"  Status: {item['status'].get('phase', '')}\")\n\nsvc = query_api(\"/api/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/services/web\")\nif svc:\n    print(\"=== SERVICE ===\")\n    print(f\"Selector: {svc['spec'].get('selector', {})}\")\n\ndeploy = query_api(\"/apis/apps/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/deployments/web-backend\")\nif deploy:\n    print(\"=== DEPLOYMENT ===\")\n    print(f\"Selector: {deploy['spec'].get('selector', {})}\")\n    print(f\"Template Labels: {deploy['spec']['template']['metadata'].get('labels', {})}\")\n"}}
{"type":"tool_result","timestamp":"2026-07-09T18:12:19.462Z","tool_id":"write_file__ezjf9331","status":"success"}

f.write(base64.b64decode(cert_b64))\nwith open(key_path, \"wb\") as f:\n    f.write(base64.b64decode(key_b64))\n\n# Set up SSL Context (unverified, since this is a local kind cluster)\ncontext = ssl._create_unverified_context()\ncontext.load_cert_chain(certfile=cert_path, keyfile=key_path)\n\n# Query endpoints\ndef query_api(path):\n    url = f\"https://127.0.0.1:6443{path}\"\n    req = urllib.request.Request(url)\n    try:\n        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=context) as response:\n            return json.loads(response.read().decode())\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error querying {path}: {e}\")\n        return None\n\npods = query_api(\"/api/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/pods\")\nif pods:\n    print(\"=== PODS ===\")\n    for item in pods.get(\"items\", []):\n        print(f\"Pod: {item['metadata']['name']}\")\n        print(f\"  Labels: {item['metadata'].get('labels', {})}\")\n        print(f\"  Status: {item['status'].get('phase', '')}\")\n\nsvc = query_api(\"/api/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/services/web\")\nif svc:\n    print(\"=== SERVICE ===\")\n    print(f\"Selector: {svc['spec'].get('selector', {})}\")\n\ndeploy = query_api(\"/apis/apps/v1/namespaces/fault-endpoints/deployments/web-backend\")\nif deploy:\n    print(\"=== DEPLOYMENT ===\")\n    print(f\"Selector: {deploy['spec'].get('selector', {})}\")\n    print(f\"Template Labels: {deploy['spec']['template']['metadata'].get('labels', {})}\")\n"}}
